Labs.pageSubtitle: Mission-critical sandboxes demonstrating high-fidelity AI orchestration, predictive forecasting, and autonomous decision layers built for enterprise-scale reliability.

missionBriefing.title: Mission Briefing
missionBriefing.p1: The AI Labs are high-fidelity environments where I test and demonstrate the integration of cutting-edge AI research into production-ready enterprise systems. This isn't just code—it's a demonstration of reliability, security, and strategic value.
missionBriefing.p2: What I Do: I architect systems that don't just 'use' AI, but orchestrate it. From RAG pipelines that ground LLMs in enterprise truth to predictive kernels that forecast financial outcomes with R² > 0.90 accuracy.

Labs.ragDesc: A real-time simulation of a Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline. Witness the decision-making logic of autonomous agents scanning millions of vector embeddings to deliver grounded, context-aware intelligence.
Labs.predictiveDesc: Interact with a high-fidelity simulation of an RCM (Revenue Cycle Management) forecasting kernel. Adjust system variables to see how neural networks predict payment outcomes and audit risks.

CaseStudies.pageSubtitle: Case studies in AI engineering, data science, and enterprise architecture—focused on solving complex business bottlenecks.

p1.title: AI Job Hunter: Autonomous Talent Acquisition System
p1.summary: Built an autonomous system that reduces job application time by 90% through intelligent filtering and RAG-based personalization.
p1.challenge: The manual process of discovering, matching, and applying for high-signal opportunities is extremely inefficient and prone to low quality. Most automation tools use 'brute force' which results in poor outcomes.
p1.solution: Architected a multi-agent system using LangChain and Gemini 3.1. It features a decision layer that scores opportunities before applying, a RAG pipeline for dynamic context injection, and Playwright for human-like browser automation.
p1.impact: Built an autonomous system that reduces job application time by 90% through intelligent filtering and RAG-based personalization.

p2.title: Predictive Analytics for Healthcare Payment Forecasting
p2.summary: Leveraging ML to forecast payment behaviors in RCM, achieving R² > 0.90 for financial prioritization.
p2.challenge: Healthcare revenue cycles are often reactive. Organizations struggle with delayed payments and high denial rates because they can't predict which claims are at risk.
p2.solution: Developed a proactive framework using Random Forest and Neural Networks on a 3-year dataset (~28k records). Leveraging ML to forecast payment behaviors in RCM, achieving R² > 0.90 for financial prioritization.
p2.impact: Enhanced financial predictability for large-scale healthcare providers and achieved R² > 0.90 accuracy.

p3.title: RevOps AI: Autonomous Data Auditing Platform
p3.summary: A B2B SaaS transforming Healthcare RCM through autonomous data auditing and agentic pods.
p3.challenge: Billing errors and data hygiene issues cost healthcare providers millions. Manual auditing is slow, inconsistent, and unscalable.
p3.solution: Built a platform with an Autonomous Agent Architecture (CEO, Eng, ML Pods). It uses a specialized logic component to scan for architectural patterns and Scikit-learn models for payment forecasting.
p3.impact: Reduced manual audit effort by 40% and improved KPI visibility for financial controllers through real-time predictive dashboards.

p4.title: Collective Intranet: Enterprise Workflow Engine
p4.summary: A secure internal platform centralizing onboarding, training, and performance tracking for RCM teams.
p4.challenge: Managing a growing team across multiple RCM departments required a centralized, secure system for training, task management, and administrative reporting.
p4.solution: Architected a secure internal platform using Next.js and PostgreSQL. Features centralized tasking, onboarding flows, and automated performance tracking for RCM teams.
p4.impact: Streamlined operations for 50+ members, improving productivity and data security.

p5.title: CareerForge AI 3.0: Voice-AI Career OS
p5.summary: Revolutionizing how candidates prepare for high-stakes interviews with real-time AI feedback.
p5.challenge: Job seekers lack realistic, real-time data and high-fidelity practice tools for competitive tech roles.
p5.solution: Built a multi-agent career OS featuring low-latency voice interactions (Gemini 3.1 Live API) and real-time market grounding using Google Search integration.
p5.impact: Built a voice-first career platform that provides real-time market grounding and interview coaching.

p6.title: ReviewRadar AI: Consumer Sentiment Intelligence
p6.summary: Processing 7M+ reviews to generate actionable sentiment insights for business growth.
p6.challenge: Businesses struggle to extract actionable insights from massive volumes of unstructured customer feedback.
p6.solution: Developed an end-to-end sentiment intelligence platform with multi-threaded ETL pipelines, ensemble ML models, and VADER sentiment scores.
p6.impact: Captured and processed 7M+ data points to provide deep technical insight into consumer behavior.

p7.title: CodeX: Competitive Coding & Algorithmic Practice
p7.summary: A robust platform for high-performance algorithmic practice and competitive coding simulations.
p7.challenge: Traditional coding platforms often lack specialized local-first performance tracking and specialized practice modes.
p7.solution: Built a specialized environment focusing on algorithmic efficiency, featuring real-time execution metrics and structural complexity analysis.
p7.impact: Developed a high-performance environment for mastering data structures and algorithmic complexity.

p8.title: Disaster Management System: Centralized Response Hub
p8.summary: Digitizing relief coordination and resource allocation during critical natural disasters.
p8.challenge: Coordination during natural disasters is often fragmented, leading to delayed relief and inefficient resource distribution.
p8.solution: Developed a centralized response platform integrating real-time reporting, resource tracking, and volunteer coordination modules using PHP and MySQL.
p8.impact: Centralized relief efforts and optimized resource distribution for faster disaster response.

p9.title: Statistical Application: Financial Forecast Modeling
p9.summary: Applying rigorous statistical methodologies to validate financial forecasting accuracy.
p9.challenge: Financial forecasts often fail due to improper validation of underlying statistical assumptions in high-volatility environments.
p9.solution: Engineered a specialized application for comparing predictive performance across various statistical models, incorporating sensitivity analysis.
p9.impact: Improved forecast reliability through advanced statistical validation and error distribution checks.

Experience.pageSubtitle: A track record of engineering complex systems and leading digital transformation at scale.

s1.title: Enterprise Architecture & Digital Transformation
s1.d1: Principal Architect of the Collective Intranet System: Engineered a secure, hybrid SQL/NoSQL platform (Flask, PostgreSQL, MongoDB GridFS) centralizing all enterprise workflows.
s1.d2: Implemented a high-security framework featuring 2FA, company email validation, Redis-based rate limiting, and account lock logic.
s1.d3: Designed a complex training-and-progression engine with timed assessments, automated scoring, and administrative approval gates.
s1.d4: Managed end-to-end CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions with deployment to Azure Web Apps.

s2.title: Strategic Leadership & Operational Impact
s2.d1: Lead multi-functional teams in healthcare Revenue Cycle Management (RCM), optimizing Billing, Posting, and Denial Management workflows.
s2.d2: Architected real-time performance analytics dashboards, reducing manual audit effort by over 40% and improving KPI visibility.
s2.d3: Mentored and trained staff on technical and operational workflows, ensuring a 95% pass rate in internal certification programs.

s1.title: Advanced AI Systems & RAG Innovation
s1.d1: AI Job Hunter: Architected an autonomous job application system using a LangChain-orchestrated RAG pipeline, FAISS vector search, and Playwright browser automation.
s1.d2: CodeX: Built an Architecture Intelligence Engine using Gemini 3.1 Pro and a custom static analysis GraphEngine for automatic repository mapping.
s1.d3: RevOps AI: Developed a B2B SaaS for healthcare revenue auditing using an Autonomous Agent Architecture (CEO, Eng, ML Pods) and Scikit-learn forecasting.
s1.d4: CareerForge AI 3.0: Engineered a multi-agent career OS featuring low-latency voice AI (Gemini 3.1 Live API) and real-time market grounding.
s1.d5: ReviewRadar AI: Developed an end-to-end sentiment intelligence platform processing ~7M+ reviews with ensemble ML models.

s2.title: Scientific Research & Critical Systems
s2.d1: RCM Predictive Analytics: Published research achieving R² > 0.90 in healthcare payment forecasting using Random Forest and Neural Networks.
s2.d2: Disaster Management: Developed a Laravel-based flood mitigation system for Sri Lanka with integrated SMS gateways for geo-fenced mass alerting.
s2.d3: Statistical App: Built an interactive analysis tool for PCA, Inferential Statistics, and ML lifecycle management using Streamlit.

CTA.desc: From autonomous AI pods to enterprise-scale platforms—let's build something that moves the needle.
